# MotionMax — AI Video Generator

> MotionMax is an AI video creation platform that transforms text into professional cinematic videos, explainer content, visual stories, and infographics.

## What MotionMax Does

MotionMax takes any text input (articles, topics, ideas, documents) and generates complete videos with:

- AI-written scripts (Claude Sonnet 4.6) with narrative arcs and character bibles
- AI-generated scene images (Hypereal/Gemini Flash) with style consistency
- AI image-to-video conversion (Kling V2.5/V2.6 Pro) with seamless scene transitions
- AI voiceover narration (Qwen3 TTS, Fish Audio, ElevenLabs, LemonFox) in 11 languages
- 25+ caption/subtitle styles burned into the video
- Server-side video rendering with FFmpeg

## Product Types

- **Cinematic** — 15-scene AI videos with image-to-video transitions, camera motions, and end-image morphing
- **Explainer** — Document/article to narrated slideshow videos with multiple images per scene
- **Visual Stories** — AI scriptwriting + image generation + voiceover storytelling
- **Smart Flow** — Data-to-infographic with optional narration

## Key Capabilities

- AI topic research for factual accuracy (character appearances, cultural context)
- Scene-by-scene editing (image edit, audio regen, video regen)
- Image editing with natural language (Nano Banana Edit)
- Voice cloning (ElevenLabs)
- Multi-language: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Italian, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Haitian Creole
- Social media sharing with OG meta previews
- Mobile-friendly with native share sheet for downloads

## Pricing

- **Free Trial**: 150 one-time credits — $0 (no credit card required)
- **Creator**: 500 credits/month + 60 daily bonus — $29/mo (or $19/mo billed annually)
- **Studio**: 2,500 credits/month + 150 daily bonus — $99/mo (or $66/mo billed annually)
- **Enterprise**: Unlimited credits (fair use), custom pricing — contact sales@motionmax.io

### Credit Economy

- 1 credit = 1 second of standard video output
- Cinematic videos use 5× credits (heavier AI compute: Kling I2V + ASR + research)
- Re-edits (image, video, audio regen) are free — no extra credit cost
- Credit top-up packs available: 300 credits ($9.99), 900 credits ($24.99), 2,500 credits ($59.99)

## AI Training Policy

MotionMax does not use user-generated content (scripts, prompts, uploaded documents, generated images, audio, or video) for AI model training without explicit written consent. To exercise your right to confirm or restrict use of your content, contact privacy@motionmax.io.

## Links

- Website: https://motionmax.io
- App: https://motionmax.io/app
- Pricing: https://motionmax.io/pricing
